series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, photographs and multimedia files in any and all formats, negatives, slides, and other output documenting events, activities, and other occasions for the Office of the Governor, or for the Development Services Agency. NOTE: Photographs and multimedia files that serve a temporary purpose and are of transient and limited value should be managed in accordance with the Agency’s Transient Documents retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: period specified electronic format. If also stored in electronic/digital format, or if converted electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed verification of successful conversion and if no longer of value in paper form. ; Electronic: in office or offsite storage during current administration LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
